hook.text: Journey has no words, no HUD, no combat. Players cried at the ending. It communicated purely through design.

buildup.text: Thatgamecompany designed Journey as an emotional experiment. Could a game make strangers feel connected?

discovery.text: Anonymous online partners can only communicate through musical chimes. Yet deep bonds form every session.

twist.text: Players sent thank-you letters to Jenova Chen. Some said Journey helped them grieve the loss of loved ones.

climax.text: Journey proved games don't need words or violence to create profound emotional experiences.

punchline.text: No words. No combat. No names. Players still cried together.

quiz.question: How do players communicate in Journey?
options: Through musical chimes only—no words or text
